name: kcc-dev-workflow
description: Orchestrates a feature from idea to QA test cases. Phase 0 (step-brainstorm, main session) produces kickoff.md; a 5-teammate team then chains spec → AC → multi-agent review+rewrite → test cases → multi-agent review+rewrite. Leverages superpowers:brainstorming and kcc-testing:write-test-cases when present; self-contained Path B fallback otherwise. Part 2 (build-feature) is a placeholder.
